description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 11 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 39 mins. His work was mainly in Java (64%) and Markdown (22%), with other activity making up 13%. The JSON does not list any public GitHub commits, repos, pull requests, or new repos this week.
